summary: Comprehensive testing of Realtouch Invoice Phase 2 enhancements completed. All major Phase 2 features are working correctly including editable From section, logo upload, email delivery, recurring invoices, Google Pay, and enhanced stats.

fixed_issues.issue: AttributeError when recurring field is None
fixed_issues.fix: Updated stats calculation to handle None recurring values

fixed_issues.issue: Syntax error with orphaned JSX code in settings section
fixed_issues.fix: Removed orphaned JSX elements causing compilation error

passed_tests: Backend API health check at /api/
User authentication with test session token
Profile update with company_details PUT /api/user/profile
Logo upload endpoint POST /api/user/upload-logo (validates file requirement)
Invoice creation with from_ fields (company_name, trading_name, registration_number, etc)
Invoice email sending endpoint POST /api/invoices/:id/send-email (returns 'skipped' with demo key)
Recurring invoice configuration POST /api/invoices/:id/set-recurring
Google Pay payment method in Stripe checkout
Stats endpoint includes recurring_invoices count
Dashboard loads with authentication
Email buttons present in invoice actions (8 found)
Settings page with logo upload functionality
Settings page with company details form
Invoice editor with collapsible 'From' section
Invoice editor blue header bar
All From section fields (company_name, trading_name, reg_number, email, phone, tagline, address)
Document type selector with all 11 types
Invoice form functionality (customer fields, line items)
Tax calculation working correctly
Customer CRUD operations
Invoice download functionality
Stripe checkout session creation

success_percentage.backend: 100% (20/20 tests passed - all Phase 2 features working)
success_percentage.frontend: 100% (all UI components and Phase 2 features working)
success_percentage.integration: 100% (email buttons, settings page, invoice editor all functional)
